test_totals.notes: Live GUI test execution blocked in this environment because xvfb-run is unavailable; fallback GUI test target build succeeded.

acceptance_criteria.description: Each rebuilt ICM allocation spinner explicitly includes vertical spinner orientation in its style.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: ICMSelectionGUI::selectWeapon uses wxSP_ARROW_KEYS | wxSP_VERTICAL for rebuilt spinners.

acceptance_criteria.description: The dialog rebuild flow still fits correctly and keeps the controls within the client area.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Existing rebuild/fit flow remains in place and GUI regression fixture keeps geometry/in-client assertions.

acceptance_criteria.description: GUI regression coverage fails if the ICM spinner style loses the explicit vertical orientation in the future.
acceptance_criteria.evidence: TacticalGuiLiveTest includes runtime style-bit checks and source-token assertion for wxSP_ARROW_KEYS | wxSP_VERTICAL.
